title: The Uttaranchal (Alteration of Name) Act, 2006
full_text: The Uttaranchal (Alteration of Name) Act, 2006 उत्तरांचल (नाम-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 2006 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200652 Act Number: 52 Enactment Date: 2006-12-21 Act Year: 2006 Short Title: The Uttaranchal (Alteration of Name) Act, 2006 Hindi Title: उत्तरांचल (नाम-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 2006 Long Title: An Act to alter the name of the State of Uttaranchal. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-01-2007 Notification: 1st January, 2007, vide notification No. GSR 779(E), dated 29th December, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Alteration of name of the State of Uttaranchal. Section 4. Amendment of First Schedule to the Constitution. Section 5. Amendment of Fourth Schedule to the Constitution. Section 6. Power to adapt laws. Section 7. Power to construe laws. Section 8. Legal proceedings.
